reviews.review_description:
I've seen some of Pit Mouse' other work so thought I'd give this a go. It's still a work in progress but it's awesome even at the moment. If you're an ex-miner, like myself, you'll marvel at the accuracy of the underground (and other parts - no spoilers).

There are some very good history of coal mining also in the game for anyone wanting to learn more about coal. 

I highly recommend this for ex-miners and non-miners  alike. I absolutely love it, and you will too.
This is a work in progress but so far very well built. And I love the humour of the northern mice, looking forward to exploring more when the app if finished.

Pit Mouse is an engaging and unique experience that immerses players in a fascinating historical setting. Even in its early release, the game shows great promise with its detailed environment and captivating historical storyline. Definitely engaging with its dry humor/wit and great one liners and the chance to play with some big underground mining equipment what's not to love. The developer is passionate about this game and clearly dedicated to refining and expanding the experience, and I'm excited to see where it goes from here. At this price point it’s definitely worth checking out as it continues to evolve!

Still in development.

Never played an educational game before.

This one has plenty of interaction and educational information… mixed in with good humour and atmospheric game.

Graphics are ok, but it’s more about the fun whilst been educated.
Sounds are suitable for what the style of edutainment game it is.

Learn about mining in UK, right from the beginning via a map.

Go through the procedures of getting a job in a mine… from the job application, interview, medical and into the job.

Many interactive items and tools lye around for you to play with and explore.

As this game is still in development, some areas are “coming soon”

An interesting, funny and fun edutainment game for younger ones to learn about mining… or even for adults wanting to look into the history of mining more in VR.

developer_response.body: Thanks very much for the consise review it's appreciated !!!

reviews.review_description: Game is fun, I will play more cause it's cute and addictive. Need smoth controls for me, maybe I missed it in options. But over all game is great! Needs more control options and hints. Great job alan(DEV). 😁

developer_response.body: Thanks Shawn for taking the time !!

reviews.review_description: I'm so far enjoying this cute little game. Reminds me of moss. I didn't get too far yet. I'm stuck in the medical portion. Lol. I can't touch my toes for some reason, but ill get there.

developer_response.body: Hey Steve thanks for the review. The problem you're experiencing is because you need to do a Meta reset (hold the meta button) this resets your grounding and postion correctly. Cheers

reviews.review_description:
If you like ur history and humour in one then this is for you, get ya sen down t pub n have a giggle 

10/10 👌🤣

developer_response.body: Cheers mate !! or "mucca" as we used to call it ;)

reviews.review_description: Very funny yorkshire lingo. Cute mice. Cant wait for further updates!! Loved reading history of hundreds of years in the coal mines. So refreshing different. Love it!! Good luck lads xx

developer_response.body: Thanks for a wonderful review, more to come ;-)
